User.title: User
User.description: A user of the puzzle app

currentStreak.description: The user's current consecutive daily puzzle solve streak

longestStreak.description: The user's longest consecutive daily puzzle solve streak

lastSolveDate.description: The date of the user's last puzzle solve (YYYY-MM-DD)

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and streak information
